content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 7, 0), (0, 9, 3), (1, 8, 8), (0, 1, 10), (6, 7, 10), (5, 9, 19), (3, 5, 21), (0, 6, 24), (1, 2, 24), (0, 7, 25), (5, 8, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 21.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (2, 7, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 9, 3) has node 0 and time 3. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 8, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 1, 10) has node 0 and time 10. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (6, 7, 10) has node 6 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 9, 19) has node 5 and time 19. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 5, 21) has node 3 and time 21. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 6, 24) has node 0 and time 24. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 2, 24) has node 1 and time 24. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (0, 7, 25) has node 0 and time 25. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 8, 29) has node 5 and time 29. -> Add node 8.

Now we have the following nodes matched at time 21: 5, 9, 10, 1, 2, 7, and 8.

Answer: [5, 9, 10, 1, 2, 7, 8]
